design_philosophy.core_principle: Every user is a performer. The UI is their stage.
design_philosophy.emotional_archetype: Jewel & Luxury (Archetype 5) mixed with Vibrant Play

headings.usage: Use for all Tier names (Peasant, King), Section Headers, and Impact Statements.

body.usage: All UI text, queue lists, lyrics, and standard content.

primary.description: The Royal Gold. Use gradients, never flat colors for primary actions.

spacing.scale: Generous. Use p-6, p-8, p-12. Avoid cramped p-2 or p-4 layouts.

primary.classes: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#FFD700] to-[#D97706] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:scale-105 transition-transform shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(253,185,49,0.4)] rounded-full px-8 py-3

secondary.classes: bg-white/5 border border-white/20 hover:bg-white/10 text-white backdrop-blur-md rounded-full px-6 py-2

glass.classes: bg-[#1A0B2E]/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-6 hover:border-[#FFD700]/30 transition-colors

inputs.classes: bg-black/20 border-white/10 focus:border-[#FFD700] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FFD700] text-white placeholder:text-white/30 rounded-lg h-12

badges.rank_badge: rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-600 to-indigo-900 border border-white/20 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-white

landing_page.description: Asymmetric layout. Hero section must be full screen with parallax. Feature blocks should alternate sizes.
landing_page.hero_structure: Full viewport height. Background image (curtains/stage) with heavy dark overlay (bg-black/80). Centered Gold Typography.

dashboard.description: Dense, data-rich but breathable. Current Rank is the 'Hero' cell (col-span-2). Queue is a tall list (row-span-2).

queue_list.style: Table-less list. Each song is a 'row' card with glassmorphism. Current singer is highlighted in Gold.

hero_bg.usage: Hero section background with opacity-30 overlay

mic_closeup.usage: Login/Signup side image, or 'Add to Queue' modal header

icons.style: Thin strokes (1.5px), Gold or White color.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for dark backgrounds. Use solid deep colors (e.g., #0F0518) or subtle noise textures.
Do NOT use standard HTML inputs. Use the custom styled inputs defined in components.
Always use the 'Cinzel' font for the word 'King' or rank titles.
Ensure 3:1 contrast ratio for all text, even on glass backgrounds.
Data-testid attributes are mandatory for all interactive elements.
Avoid 'Inter' font completely. Use Manrope for body.
implementation_steps: 1. Install dependencies: framer-motion, lucide-react, sonner, clsx, tailwind-merge, @fontsource/cinzel, @fontsource/manrope
2. Update tailwind.config.js with the custom color palette and font families.
3. Update index.css to set the root dark theme variables.
4. Create the 'Layout' component that handles the background gradient/texture.
5. Build the atomic components (Button, Card, Input) first.
